sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE, timestamp_col TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, timestamp_col) VALUES (1, 0.54, timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-09-28 18:40:05.123+02:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, timestamp_col) VALUES (2, NULL, timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-09-29 18:40:05.123+02:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, timestamp_col) VALUES (3, 1.5, timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-01-01 00:00:00.000+00:00');
SELECT id, acos(value) AS acos_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-09-28 18:40:05.123+02:00' as ts FROM test_table WHERE value < 2.0;

SELECT t1.id, t2.acos_value FROM (SELECT id, acos(value) AS acos_value FROM test_table) AS t1 JOIN (SELECT id, timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-10-01 12:00:00.000+02:00' AS ts FROM test_table) AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE acos(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE timestamp_col < timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-09-30 00:00:00.000+02:00' HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id, value, acos(COALESCE(value, 0)) AS acos_value FROM test_table;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value, timestamp_col FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, timestamp(3) with time zone '2021-01-01 00:00:00.000+00:00' AS future_ts, acos(value) AS acos_val FROM temp_table WHERE future_ts > timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-12-31 00:00:00.000+00:00';
